title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on critical infrastructure improvements that enhance platform reliability. We restored access to historical weeks W12 and W13, fixed deployment issues that were blocking Salesforce workflows, and resolved a critical problem that prevented HubSpot automations from launching properly.

entries.headline: Restored access to historical weeks W12 and W13
Improved Salesforce field validation and deployment reliability
details: Better detection of State/Country field configuration issues

entries.headline: Restored HubSpot automation functionality
details: Fixed critical issue preventing HubSpot automations from launching
